About Experience Work Contact
AP
Hi, my name is Arsh Puri.

Bridging deep systems engineering with high-impact product growth.

I am a versatile software engineer who builds everything from custom Linux kernel modules for defense applications to AI-driven SaaS platforms. I thrive at the intersection of low-level architecture and user-facing impact.

View my work GitHub

Where I've Built

Research Intern

Scientific Analysis Group (DRDO)
Present • Delhi, India
  • Selected to enhance the security architecture of Software Defined Radios (SDRs) for Indian defense applications.
  • Analyzing vulnerabilities in conventional radio communication systems and deploying dynamic, secure SDR solutions for tactical environments.
  • Authored comprehensive technical documentation and literature reviews translating complex theoretical findings into stakeholder-ready reports.
  • Authored a research paper analyzing the enhancement of SDR firmware security leveraging blockchain technology.

Outreach Head — Zenevia

Bennett University
2025
  • Led a 15-member outreach team for the university’s flagship tech fest comprising 33 diverse technical events.
  • Built and managed a robust 2,500+ contact database of student leaders, technical organizations, and partners.
  • Generated ₹2+ lakhs in early revenue through 400+ paid registrations, contributing to an overall 1,200+ footfall.
  • Owned end-to-end strategy, cross-functional communication, and on-ground execution.

Outreach & Business Dev Intern

Gigglle & CrownCast
2025
  • Expanded the talent academy database across the NCR region, targeting high-value corporate outreach.
  • Designed and executed data-driven cold calling and email campaigns to successfully onboard new partners and users.
  • Promoted affiliate marketing solutions to customer-centric brands, leveraging tools like RocketReach for precision lead generation.

Featured Engineering

ResumeMatch AI

A monetizable AI SaaS platform for resume parsing and job matching. Architected across Next.js, FastAPI, and Supabase. Leveraged advanced AI agents and prompt engineering to orchestrate cloud infrastructure and complex matching algorithms, taking the product rapidly from concept to production-readiness.

  • Next.js
  • FastAPI
  • Supabase
  • AI Workflows

Kernel Module: Immortal Process

A custom loadable Linux kernel module in C that intercepts process behavior within kernel space. Successfully hooked and modified sys_kill signal handling paths to selectively block termination signals (SIGKILL, SIGTERM) for protected PIDs, utilizing deep internal kernel structures.

  • C
  • Linux Kernel API
  • Syscall Hooking

Multimodal Sentiment Analysis

Explainable AI system integrating BERT-based text understanding with ResNet-50 visual features via a custom fusion classifier. Implemented LIME for word-level contribution insights, deployed via a real-time interactive Gradio UI to ensure model transparency.

  • Python
  • ResNet-50
  • BERT
  • Gradio

Sniff Beacons

Command-line network analysis tool developed in Bash for Linux environments. Delivers real-time tracking of bandwidth utilization, IP configurations, and active network connections natively through the terminal.

  • Bash
  • Networking
  • Linux CLI
